::: {.post-nav}

::: {.post-glossary}
- [Overview](index.qmd)
- [Concept map](concept-map.qmd){.nav-concept-map}

[Core]{.post-nav-group}

- [Layout — Track A](02-architecture.qmd)
- [Forward operators — Track B](forward-operators.qmd)
- [Evaluation model](03-evaluation-model.qmd)

[Prerequisite]{.post-nav-group}

- [Primer](primer.qmd)
- [Glossary](../glossary/index.qmd)
- [References](references.qmd)

[Secondary]{.post-nav-group}

- [Problems with mmCIF](01-problems.qmd)
- [Annotations & the artifact engine](04-annotations-and-engine.qmd)
- [Technology survey](04b-technology-survey.qmd)
- [Open questions](05-open-questions.qmd)
- [ML-native access patterns](08-ml-native.qmd)
- [Appendix: black-box data](06-black-box-data.qmd)
- [Appendix: modularity examples](07-modularity-examples.qmd)
:::

::: {.post-sections}
:::

:::
